system.description: Archons are a race of celestials, or good outsiders, native to lawful good–aligned Outer Planes. Unless otherwise noted, an archon has darkvision 60 ft. and low-light vision; aura of menace; immunity to electricity and petrification; a +4 racial bonus on saves against poison; constant magic circle against evil (caster level = HD); at-will greater teleport (self plus up to 50 lb. of objects only, CL 14th); and constant tongues (CL 14th).
